name: sessfix
description: Detect and non-destructively recover RDP sessions wedged/blocked by Local Session Manager.
author: djdarcy
notes: First category of the wtf-rdp aggregator. `status` ships first (read-only). install/uninstall/query/recover/logs/config land next, each as tools/sessfix/<tool>/.wtf-rdp.json + a .ps1 wrapping the bundled watchdog in assets/.
